import { NavLink } from "react-router-dom"; import Icon from "./Icon"; import StatusBadge from "./StatusBadge"; const NAV_ITEMS = [ { to: "/overview", label: "Dashboard", icon: "dashboard" }, { to: "/monitoring", label: "Live Monitoring", icon: "monitor" }, { to: "/patients", label: "Patients", icon: "patients" }, { to: "/alerts", label: "Alerts", icon: "alerts" }, { to: "/history", label: "History / Logs", icon: "history" }, { to: "/devices", label: "Devices", icon: "devices" }, { to: "/reports", label: "Reports / Export", icon: "reports" }, { to: "/settings", label: "Settings / Maintenance", icon: "settings" }, ]; export default function SidebarNav() { return (
VP
VitalPulse Zimbabwe Rural Care
Navigation
{NAV_ITEMS.map((item) => ( `vp-nav-item ${isActive ? "is-active" : ""}`} > {item.label} ))}
Monitoring Workflow

Rural vital monitoring

Register a device, link a patient, monitor readings, review alerts, and export logs.

VitalPulse Console | Device-linked monitoring

); }
